violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside deli meat chub case.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in deli walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor/floor edges in deli and bakery need more thorough cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
